overall.description: Flight simulator gameplay showing first-person exploration of a fighter jet cockpit with detailed avionics and controls, transitioning to a third-person external view of the parked aircraft on an airport tarmac featuring distinctive shark mouth nose art.

events.description: camera pans upward from instrument panel to view the canopy and sky above

agents.ego_description: pilot looking around the cockpit interior, examining flight instruments, control stick, and side panels while stationary on the ground

entered.detail: array of multifunction displays, gauges, and flight instruments with dark screens
black flight stick with buttons and hat switch positioned between the pilots legs
throttle quadrant and additional control panels with various switches
arched metal canopy frame with transparent panels showing blue sky
pilot seat with visible harness and headrest

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a detailed first-person view inside a fighter jet cockpit. The camera pans across the instrument panel filled with avionics displays, the central flight control stick, and side consoles with throttle controls. Around the 6-second mark, the view tilts upward to reveal the arched canopy frame and clear blue sky above, indicating the aircraft is parked on the ground with engines off.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport tarmac with parked military aircraft

events.description: camera transitions from cockpit interior to external third-person view of the aircraft fuselage

agents.ego_description: viewing the aircraft exterior from ground level, focusing on the fuselage details and nose art

notable_agents.action: parked fighter jet stationary on the tarmac with distinctive shark mouth paint scheme visible on the nose

entered.detail: light gray military aircraft fuselage with panel lines, air intakes, and maintenance access panels
distinctive shark teeth nose art painted in black and white on the aircraft nose section
concrete airport ramp with visible expansion joints and shadows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an external view of the parked fighter jet on an airport tarmac. The camera moves along the side of the light gray fuselage, revealing distinctive shark mouth nose art painted near the front. The aircraft canopy is visible in the background, and the concrete tarmac stretches out under clear midday skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intricate interior of a fighter jet cockpit to an external view of the aircraft on a sunny tarmac. It begins with a detailed pan across the instrument panel, gliding over the avionics displays, the central flight control stick, and the side throttle consoles. As the camera tilts upward to reveal the arched canopy frame against a clear blue sky, the perspective shifts seamlessly from the enclosed cabin to the outside environment. The scene then expands to follow the length of the light gray fuselage, moving along the aircraft's side to reveal the distinctive shark mouth nose art painted near the front. Finally, the view settles on the parked jet as the concrete tarmac stretches out under the bright midday light.
